# Attune

> Attune is an emotion AI-powered dating app that matches people based on genuine emotional compatibility, using real-time facial analysis technology developed by Cavefish AI.

## What is Attune?

Attune is a dating application that uses emotional AI to match users based on authentic emotional compatibility rather than surface-level attraction or self-reported personality traits. The app watches users' facial reactions as they view a short video, analyses their emotional responses using the EchoDepth engine, and uses these emotional fingerprints to match them with genuinely compatible people.

## How it works

1. **Video session**: The user watches a curated short video clip on their phone.
2. **Emotion capture**: The EchoDepth AI (by Cavefish AI) analyses 42 facial Action Units (FACS) in real time, mapping emotional responses across three dimensions: Valence, Arousal, and Dominance (the VAD model).
3. **Matching**: An anonymised emotional compatibility vector is generated and matched against other users in the Attune pool.
4. **Introduction**: Users are introduced to emotionally compatible matches.

## The technology

Attune is powered by **EchoDepth**, an emotion AI engine built by **Cavefish AI** (Cardiff, Wales, UK). EchoDepth performs real-time Facial Action Unit (FACS/AU) analysis using a device's standard front-facing camera — no wearables or specialist hardware required.

- **Company**: Cavefish AI Ltd — https://cavefish.co.uk
- **Technology**: EchoDepth (camera-based facial AU analysis)
- **Research base**: Paul Ekman's Facial Action Coding System (FACS)
- **Processing**: On-device; raw biometric data never transmitted to servers

## Key differentiators

- No fake profiles: live emotion capture defeats bots and catfish accounts
- On-device processing: raw facial data never leaves the user's phone
- GDPR compliant: full right-to-erasure, no data sold to advertisers
- Emotion-first matching: rewards authenticity, not performance

## Privacy stance

- Raw emotional/biometric data: processed on-device only, never transmitted
- Retained data: anonymised emotional compatibility vector (encrypted, deletable)
- Data sharing: never sold or shared with third parties or advertisers
- Compliance: UK GDPR, right to erasure
- Business model: subscription fee (not data monetisation)

## Availability

- Platform: iOS, Android
- Launch market: United Kingdom
- Status: Waitlist open; public launch Q3 2026
- Waitlist: https://attune.love

## Contact

- Website: https://attune.love
- Parent company: Cavefish AI — https://cavefish.co.uk
- Safety: safety@attune.love
- Privacy: privacy@attune.love
- Legal: legal@attune.love
- General: hello@attune.love
